note: Hand pack (owner spec 2026-07-12): hours/minutes/seconds images pointing UP + this file. pivot = the rotation center per hand: x from the left (null = the image middle), y in pixels FROM THE BOTTOM; z_order lists the draw order bottom-up. Sizing uses TIP-TO-PIVOT lengths only: the seconds tip touches the ring, the minutes tip the minute arrows, the hours follow the pack's own hours/minutes ratio.
name: CLASSIC
